overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving along an elevated highway at dusk, transitioning from a dense neon-lit cityscape to open mountain views and industrial districts. The scene features a flying car passing overhead and ends with the vehicle driving under an elevated monorail track.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching cyberpunk city center

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left across the highway

agents.ego_description: driving straight along elevated highway toward the illuminated city skyline

notable_agents.action: flying car traveling across the sky above the highway

entered.detail: distinctive skyscraper with bright green illuminated sections near the top
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with neon lighting and holographic displays
tall modern street lamps with horizontal LED light bars

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight along an elevated highway toward a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at dusk. A distinctive green-lit tower dominates the left skyline while a flying car passes overhead. The road is empty with modern street lights lining the right side.

events.description: highway curves right revealing distant mountain range behind the city skyline

agents.ego_description: following the rightward curve of the highway as the cityscape shifts to reveal mountains

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountains visible against the gradient dusk sky

segments.scene_description: As the highway curves to the right, the dense city skyline shifts to the left and a vast mountain range becomes visible in the distance. The green-lit tower passes out of view behind the vehicle while the road continues to bend through the open elevated space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with industrial district and moon

agents.ego_description: driving forward with the moon visible ahead and industrial structures on the right

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the dusky sky ahead
tall white industrial chimney or cooling tower structure
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the open highway with the moon prominently visible ahead. Industrial buildings including a tall white tower appear on the right, while the city skyline fades into the distance. Digital billboards line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing under elevated monorail track

events.description: passing under large elevated monorail track that creates partial cover overhead

agents.ego_description: driving under the elevated monorail structure as it passes overhead

entered.detail: large elevated transit structure with support pillars and track passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath a massive elevated monorail track that creates a semi-covered section of highway. The industrial tower and moon shift position as the vehicle progresses under the concrete structure, with the track extending from the left to pass directly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape into an open industrial landscape under a twilight sky. It begins with the vehicle heading straight toward a sprawling skyline dominated by a green-lit tower as a flying car passes overhead. As the highway curves to the right, the city shifts to the left and the green tower disappears from view, revealing a vast mountain range in the distance. The scene then opens further to show a prominent moon ahead and digital billboards to the left, while industrial buildings and a tall white tower emerge on the right. Finally, the vehicle drives beneath a massive concrete monorail track that arches overhead, partially shielding the road as the industrial horizon shifts behind the structure.
